title: Poisonous Potato Update
description: Almost all content from the April Fools' snapshot 24w14potato
body:
The mod adds (almost) everything that was added in April Fools' snapshot 24w14potato including a new dimension, boss and structures!

Differences from the original version:
- Floatatar is not functioning
- Mechanics with toxic resins are implemented in 'Special Fletching Table' which is crafted from a regular Fletching Block
- The splash screen in the game menu has not been replaced.
- Slight differences in the generation of the terrain
- Non-critical differences in portal functionality
